caption.zh-CN: 图 1  系统环境：人员、外部采集数据、系统与受管项目
caption.en-GB: Figure 1  System context: people, captured data, the product and managed projects

alt_text.zh-CN: 评估用户、领域专家和维护者与离线 Pilot Assessment System 交互；模拟器数据进入系统，运行证据和来源信息保存到受管项目。
alt_text.en-GB: Evaluators, domain experts and maintainers interact with the offline Pilot Assessment System; simulator data enters the product and immutable run evidence is stored in managed projects.

diagrams.scope: Portable software-copy containers and data ownership

caption.zh-CN: 图 2  容器和所有权：WinUI、Python sidecar、系统模型库与用户项目
caption.en-GB: Figure 2  Containers and ownership: WinUI, Python sidecar, the system model library and user projects

alt_text.zh-CN: WinUI 通过本地 JSON-RPC 调用 Python sidecar；sidecar 使用公开源码和私有运行时，系统模型库属于软件副本，Session 与运行结果属于用户项目。
alt_text.en-GB: WinUI calls the local Python sidecar over JSON-RPC; the sidecar uses exposed source and a private runtime, the model library belongs to the software copy, and sessions and run results belong to user projects.
